ddls:
CREATE TABLE "mining_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mining site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the mining site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the mining site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the mining site */,
  "site_manager" TEXT /* Name of the site manager */,
  "site_capacity_tons_per_day" REAL /* Capacity of the site in tons per day */,
  "site_operational_since" TEXT /* Date when the site started operations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the operator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the operator */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mining site the operator works at */,
  "operator_role" TEXT /* Role of the operator (e.g., supervisor, technician) */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Relevant certifications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flotation_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data entry */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mining site */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the operator managing the process */,
  "iron_feed_pct" REAL /* Percentage of iron in the feed */,
  "silica_feed_pct" REAL /* Percentage of silica in the feed */,
  "starch_flow" REAL /* Flow rate of starch used in flotation */,
  "amina_flow" REAL /* Flow rate of amina used in flotation */,
  "ore_pulp_flow" REAL /* Flow rate of ore pulp entering flotation */,
  "ore_pulp_ph" REAL /* pH level of the ore pulp */,
  "ore_pulp_density" REAL /* Density of the ore pulp */,
  "flotation_col1_air_flow" REAL /* Air flow in flotation column 01 */,
  "flotation_col2_air_flow" REAL /* Air flow in flotation column 02 */,
  "flotation_col3_air_flow" REAL /* Air flow in flotation column 03 */,
  "flotation_col4_air_flow" REAL /* Air flow in flotation column 04 */,
  "flotation_col5_air_flow" REAL /* Air flow in flotation column 05 */,
  "flotation_col6_air_flow" REAL /* Air flow in flotation column 06 */,
  "flotation_col7_air_flow" REAL /* Air flow in flotation column 07 */,
  "flotation_col1_level" REAL /* Level in flotation column 01 */,
  "flotation_col2_level" REAL /* Level in flotation column 02 */,
  "flotation_col3_level" REAL /* Level in flotation column 03 */,
  "flotation_col4_level" REAL /* Level in flotation column 04 */,
  "flotation_col5_level" REAL /* Level in flotation column 05 */,
  "flotation_col6_level" REAL /* Level in flotation column 06 */,
  "flotation_col7_level" REAL /* Level in flotation column 07 */,
  "iron_concentrate_pct" REAL /* Percentage of iron in the concentrate */,
  "silica_concentrate_pct" REAL /* Percentage of silica in the concentrate */,
  "recovery_rate" REAL /* Recovery rate of the process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flotation_data_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flotation_data_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES mining_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "process_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter record */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mining site */,
  "min_iron_feed" REAL /* Minimum iron feed percentage allowed */,
  "max_iron_feed" REAL /* Maximum iron feed percentage allowed */,
  "min_silica_feed" REAL /* Minimum silica feed percentage allowed */,
  "max_silica_feed" REAL /* Maximum silica feed percentage allowed */,
  "min_starch_flow" REAL /* Minimum starch flow in flotation */,
  "max_starch_flow" REAL /* Maximum starch flow in flotation */,
  "min_air_flow" REAL /* Minimum air flow in flotation */,
  "max_air_flow" REAL /* Maximum air flow in flotation */,
  "min_pulp_density" REAL /* Minimum pulp density */,
  "max_pulp_density" REAL /* Maximum pulp density */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_process_parameters_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES mining_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flotation_columns" (
  "column_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flotation column */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mining site */,
  "column_number" INTEGER /* Number of the flotation column */,
  "max_air_flow" REAL /* Maximum air flow capacity for the column */,
  "max_level" REAL /* Maximum level capacity for the column */,
  "column_type" TEXT /* Type of the flotation column */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the flotation column */,
  "install_date" TEXT /* Date when the column was installed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("column_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flotation_columns_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES mining_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anomalies" (
  "anomaly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the anomaly record */,
  "flotation_data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flotation data record */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the anomaly */,
  "date_detected" TEXT /* Date when the anomaly was detected */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the anomaly (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the anomaly has been resolved */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the anomaly was resolved (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anomaly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anomalies_flotation_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("flotation_data_id") REFERENCES flotation_data ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., operator, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the alert */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition that triggers the alert */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the condition */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "notification_sent" INTEGER /* Whether a notification has been sent for the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data included in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who owns the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_config" TEXT /* Configuration of the dashboard (e.g., layout, widgets) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the role (e.g., view_flotation_data, update_process_parameters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
